name: snarl-sopi-backend
description: Snarl and Sopi operator backend v5.56: fixes uploaded product images appearing not to save. Duplicate catalog rows for one product (same weimiId under two goodsIds) both merge onto a single catalog card, and each normalized row overwrote the card image, so a STALE duplicate could clobber a fresh upload and the dashboard showed the old picture even though the upload succeeded and the kiosk had the new one. The card now keeps the most recently normalized image rather than the last row processed. Diagnostics from v5.55 retained. Cumulative over v5.55.
